User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /private/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /*.json$
Disallow: /*.tsx$

# Crawl delay for bots (optional)
Crawl-delay: 1

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://www.gotaxestimator.com/sitemap.xml

# Allow search engines to index
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 0

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 0
